category.scope_note: Filtering facepiece respirator (FFP mask) compliance comparison: China domestic (GB 2626 KN95 / GB 19083) to Senegal market (ASN normalisation adopting NS/EN 149, Ministry of Trade PEC import inspection, French-language documentation, occupational safety framework).

title.en: China-to-Senegal PPE Respirator (FFP Mask) Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国口罩呼吸器进入塞内加尔（ASN）：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國口罩呼吸器進入塞內加爾（ASN）：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese PPE respirator (KN95 / GB 2626) documentation against Senegal market-access practice — Agence Sénégalaise de Normalisation (ASN) standards adopting NS/EN 149 (FFP1/FFP2/FFP3), the Ministry of Trade Programme d'Evaluation de la Conformité (PEC) / Verification of Conformity import inspection, French-language documentation, occupational-safety framework, and the local importer obligation. Senegal has no EU-style horizontal CE-marking regime for PPE.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626）文件与塞内加尔市场准入实践对照——塞内加尔标准化局（ASN）采纳NS/EN 149（FFP1/FFP2/FFP3）标准、贸易部合格评定计划（PEC）/进口合格验证检验、法语文件、职业安全框架及本地进口商义务。塞内加尔无欧盟式PPE横向CE标志制度。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626）文件與塞內加爾市場准入實踐對照——塞內加爾標準化局（ASN）採納NS/EN 149（FFP1/FFP2/FFP3）標準、貿易部合格評定計劃（PEC）/進口合格驗證檢驗、法語文件、職業安全框架及本地進口商義務。塞內加爾無歐盟式PPE橫向CE標誌制度。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment determination, customs ruling, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Senegal law, ASN normalisation references, the Ministry of Trade PEC / Verification of Conformity scope, and import-inspection practice with qualified regulatory professionals and the local importer before shipment. The PPE-vs-medical device boundary described herein requires case-by-case legal and regulatory analysis under Senegalese law.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商及分销商在出货前，应与合格的法规专业人士及本地进口商核验现行塞内加尔法律、ASN标准化引用、贸易部PEC/合格验证范围及进口检验实践。本文所述的PPE与医疗器械界定需依塞内加尔法律逐案进行法律及法规分析。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商及分銷商在出貨前，應與合格的法規專業人士及本地進口商核驗現行塞內加爾法律、ASN標準化引用、貿易部PEC/合格驗證範圍及進口檢驗實踐。本文所述的PPE與醫療器械界定需依塞內加爾法律逐案進行法律及法規分析。

answer_first.en: Senegal has no EU-style horizontal CE-marking regime for PPE. Market access for filtering respirators runs through (1) standards set by the Agence Sénégalaise de Normalisation (ASN), which commonly adopts international/EN references as Normes Sénégalaises (e.g. NS/EN 149 for FFP1/FFP2/FFP3), and (2) the Ministry of Trade import-conformity / Verification-of-Conformity (PEC) inspection regime applied at importation, plus a registered local importer. Chinese KN95 (GB 2626) test reports are not automatically accepted — conformity is typically evidenced against the EN 149 standard adopted by ASN, with French-language documentation. Medical masks route via the national health/medicines regulator, not the occupational-PPE path. verified:false — confirm the live ASN reference and the current PEC scope with the importer before shipment.
answer_first.zh: 塞内加尔无欧盟式PPE横向CE标志制度。过滤式呼吸器的市场准入通过两条路径：（1）塞内加尔标准化局（ASN）制定的标准，通常将国际/EN标准采纳为塞内加尔标准（如FFP1/FFP2/FFP3采用NS/EN 149）；（2）贸易部在进口环节实施的进口合格/合格验证（PEC）检验制度，并须有注册本地进口商。中国KN95（GB 2626）检测报告不被自动接受——合格性通常须依ASN采纳的EN 149标准证明，并附法语文件。医用口罩走国家卫生/药品监管机构路径，而非职业PPE路径。verified:false——出货前请与进口商核实现行ASN引用标准及当前PEC范围。
answer_first.zht: 塞內加爾無歐盟式PPE橫向CE標誌制度。過濾式呼吸器的市場准入通過兩條路徑：（1）塞內加爾標準化局（ASN）制定的標準，通常將國際/EN標準採納為塞內加爾標準（如FFP1/FFP2/FFP3採用NS/EN 149）；（2）貿易部在進口環節實施的進口合格/合格驗證（PEC）檢驗制度，並須有註冊本地進口商。中國KN95（GB 2626）檢測報告不被自動接受——合格性通常須依ASN採納的EN 149標準證明，並附法語文件。醫用口罩走國家衛生/藥品監管機構路徑，而非職業PPE路徑。verified:false——出貨前請與進口商核實現行ASN引用標準及當前PEC範圍。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Quarterly, or on change to ASN normalisation references or the Ministry of Trade PEC / Verification-of-Conformity scope
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set true. Senegal-specific entries flagged verified:false until confirmed against a live ASN / Ministry of Trade source or the registered local importer; no local PDFs accepted as primary sources.
